summary: Comprehensive testing of NEW ConstructMarket features: Public Marketplace, CRM Dashboard, and Provider Payouts. Backend: 22/22 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new features working correctly with mobile responsive design.

issues: Shows loading skeleton placeholders when no tasks in a category (minor UX - expected behavior)

critical_code_review_comments: All new APIs (marketplace, CRM, provider payouts) are working correctly with proper authentication
Public marketplace endpoints (/api/marketplace/tasks) correctly return data without authentication
CRM endpoints properly restrict access to admin/founder roles only
Provider payouts page correctly shows Stripe Connect setup workflow
seed_data_creation: Using existing test data from iteration_1
context_for_next_testing_agent: NEW features tested: (1) Public Marketplace at /marketplace - browse tasks without login, category filtering works, state filtering works; (2) CRM Dashboard at /crm - accessible by admin, shows Total Revenue, GMV, Active Customers, Pipeline metrics, Recent Activity; (3) CRM Customers at /crm/customers - customer list with filtering; (4) CRM Pipeline at /crm/pipeline - sales pipeline with stages; (5) CRM Revenue at /crm/revenue - revenue analytics; (6) Provider Payouts at /provider/payouts - Stripe Connect setup, Available Balance, Payout History. Mobile responsive design tested and working.

crm_pipeline.stages_display: PASSED - New Leads, In Progress, Won, Lost

ui_tests.landing_page: PASSED - Marketplace link visible, CTA buttons work
ui_tests.marketplace_page: PASSED - Search, filters, category pills, task cards all working
ui_tests.crm_dashboard: PASSED - Business Overview, metrics cards, pipeline summary, recent activity
ui_tests.crm_customers: PASSED - Customer table, role filter, status filter
ui_tests.crm_pipeline: PASSED - Pipeline stages with deal cards
ui_tests.provider_payouts: PASSED - Stripe setup banner, balance cards, payout history
